title: Project substrate config (degree-zero)
description: Self-bootstrapping config block. The config that configures the substrate is itself a typed schema-validated block. Fields: schema_version, root (substrate location, closes GitHub #3), naming (canonical-id → display-name aliases), hierarchy (constraint declarations for closure-table edges), lenses (named projections). Ships with the package as a framework-contract schema; user override at .project/schemas/config.schema.json supersedes per the SDK's three-tier schema resolution.

schema_version.description: Semver of this config schema. The meta-anchor for FGAP-006 schema versioning.

root.description: On-disk directory housing the substrate. Default '.project'. Closes GitHub issue #3 surface (folder placement). Note: until block-api retrofit lands, this field is captured but unconsumed by block-api readers.

naming.description: Canonical-id → user-facing-name alias map. Code references canonical ids; UI/macros render configured names. Decouples terminology from code.

hierarchy.description: Constraint declaration: which (parent_block, child_block, relation_type) edges are legal in relations.json. Not the closure-table data itself. Distinguishes hierarchy edges (parent ∈ canonical ids of parent_block) from lens edges (parent ∈ lens.bins).

parent_block.description: Canonical block id whose items may appear in edge.parent

child_block.description: Canonical block id whose items may appear in edge.child

relation_type.description: Edge label disambiguating this hierarchy from lens edges

lenses.description: Named projections over a target block (kind=target) or composition over multiple blocks / sub-lenses (kind=composition). Per FGAP-012, target lenses use the existing target+relation_type contract; composition lenses use targets+members and aggregate items across blocks. The kind discriminator selects the dispatch path in loadLensView; SDK enforces kind-specific required-field constraints (target+relation_type for target; targets+members for composition) at load time.

kind.description: Lens dispatch discriminator. 'target' = single-block lens (existing semantics). 'composition' = aggregates items across multiple blocks via members[]. Defaults to 'target' when omitted to preserve back-compat with pre-FGAP-012 lens authors.

target.description: Canonical block id whose items are being projected. Required when kind=target; ignored when kind=composition (use targets[] instead).

targets.description: Canonical block ids contributing items when kind=composition. Required when kind=composition; ignored when kind=target.

members.description: Composition member declarations. Required when kind=composition. Each entry is either { lens: <lens-id> } pulling another lens's items, or { from: <block>, where: <field-equality> } pulling a flat selection from a block.

relation_type.description: Edge label in the closure table. Required when kind=target. Optional when kind=composition (composition lens may declare its own relation_type for hand-curated edges authored against the composition's bins; bins are otherwise the union over members).

derived_from_field.description: If set (kind=target only), edges synthesized at read-time from this field on each item. If null, edges read from relations.json. Composition lenses do NOT use derived_from_field — composition pulls items via members[] declarations.

bins.description: Ordered list of cluster names for rendering. Items not matching any bin go into an implicit (uncategorized) cluster.

render_uncategorized.description: Whether to render the (uncategorized) bucket of items not placed into any declared bin. Default true. Set false for curated final views.

installed_schemas.description: Schema basenames declared for installation. /project install copies registry/schemas/<name>.schema.json into .project/schemas/. User-opt-in surface per DEC-0011 (no auto-shipped defaults). Empty when omitted.

installed_blocks.description: Block basenames declared for starter installation. /project install copies registry/blocks/<name>.json into .project/. User-opt-in surface per DEC-0011 (no auto-shipped defaults). Empty when omitted.
